title: Pfizer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Pfizer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!
